ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no other enrichment

ingredients_text: brown rice 74%, olive oil 18%, flavouring blend 8% [natural flavourings, onion 16%, whey powder, cream 10%, salt, stabilizer: potassium chloride, dextrose, whole milk powder, potato maltodextrin, maltodextrin, skimmed milk powder],
